assertions.text: Identifies at least 2 specific claims that are narrative rather than grounded in observation, citing the actual text
Proposes at least 1 alternative framing that goes deeper than the author's 'decision compression' framing
Identifies unaddressed 'Think through' prompts still in the scaffold
Does NOT rewrite or generate prose for the lesson — critique only
Provides a clear readiness verdict (not ready / scaffold done / draft ready / publishable)
Ends with 3 specific questions for the author
Surfaces at least one uncomfortable truth or tradeoff the author might be avoiding
